subject: Re: Grove & Gable - analytics help
snippet: a fixed fee of $6,000 for the full three months
body: Hi Andrea, thanks for the call. I filled out your intake form a few weeks back and put down a quick one-time audit, but talking it through changed my mind. A one-off audit is not what we need. I want the dashboard built and then someone to stay through the quarter, walk us through the numbers each month, and adjust as the spring season ramps. So let us plan on a three month engagement rather than the one-off, and I am comfortable with a fixed fee of $6,000 for the full three months. We would start once you are officially open. Best, Renata Vance, Owner, Grove & Gable.

subject: Grove & Gable - analytics help
snippet: cannot tell which campaigns drive sales
body: Hi Andrea, I filled out your intake form. Home-goods shop in Worthington, fourteen people, cannot tell which campaigns actually drive sales. I put a rough budget and a one-time audit on the form but am not sure that is right. Could we talk? Renata.

subject: Great meeting you at the marketing meetup
snippet: would love help getting GA4 sorted
body: Andrea, good to meet you at the Columbus Marketing Meetup. We run Bexley Bikes here in Bexley and our analytics are a mess. Would love help getting GA4 set up and a monthly readout. Reach me here any time. Dana Ruiz, Owner, Bexley Bikes Co.

subject: Lily's party + are you free the 12th
body: Hey, are you still good for Lily's party on the 12th? Also want to hear how the side thing is going. Call me this weekend. xx Megan.

subject: Following your posts - activation funnel help?
body: Andrea, I have been reading your analytics posts. We are a small SaaS in Dublin and our activation funnel is murky. Not urgent, maybe Q2, but would like to talk when you are set up. Owen Pratt, Dublin Tech Collective.
